summary: Iteration 77 - Complete testing of new Journal feature (renamed from 'Prévisions'). Backend: 25/25 tests passed for /api/journal/dashboard and /api/journal/realtime endpoints. Frontend: All UI elements verified - tab renamed to 'Journal', 4 KPI cards, Réel/Prévisionnel toggle, horizon selector (7/30/60/90j), operations list, alerts, category breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend journal.py: Well-structured router with proper categorization logic (_categorize_expense)
Backend: Correctly uses 'total' field from invoices (with fallback to 'total_amount')
Backend: Properly filters expenses by status='completed' OR (category='paiement' AND is_paid=True)
Backend: Alert logic correct - deficit_7d triggers when balance_7d < 0, high_expense_ratio when ratio > 70%
Frontend JournalTab.jsx: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend: KPI cards display correctly with color coding (green for positive, red for negative)
Frontend: Toggle between Réel and Prévisionnel views works seamlessly
Frontend: ForecastsTab component properly embedded in Prévisionnel view
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing invoices and expenses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified the new Journal feature. Key data-testids: tab-forecasts (tab button), journal-tab (content container), journal-view-real, journal-view-forecast (toggle buttons), journal-horizon (select), journal-refresh (button), journal-alerts (alerts container), journal-op-{id} (operation rows). Backend endpoints: GET /api/journal/dashboard?days=N, GET /api/journal/realtime?days=N&limit=M. Current data: 19 validated invoices (101k F), 1 completed expense (57.5k F), balance 43.5k F, deficit_7d alert active (-226.5k F projected).
